title: They Heard Him Screaming From Empty Space
description: Granger Taylor built a spacecraft and vanished with aliens in 1980. Three months later, radio telescopes detected his voice broadcasting from the void. Subscribe to the Department archive.

youtube_metadata.shorts_caption: In 1980, Granger Taylor disappeared with aliens after building an impossible spacecraft. Months later, radio telescopes picked up his voice from the void. Subscribe for more classified cases from the Department of the Unknown.

tiktok_metadata.video_caption:
They heard him screaming from space

Granger Taylor built a real spacecraft in his backyard and vanished with aliens in 1980. Three months later, radio telescopes detected his voice broadcasting from empty space.
